Procs

proc newMustacheLexer(): MLexer {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError,
    ValueError, HLexerError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc mustacheParse(str: string): MTree {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ArgumentError, ValueError, HLexerError, ParseFail, ImplementError,
    ImplementKindError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc writeTemplate(stream: Stream; tree: MTree; ctx: MPContext) {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, Exception, ImplementKindError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect, RootEffect].}
